summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Accident Detection System. Backend APIs tested with 100% success rate. Frontend UI and integration testing completed successfully with role-based access control, navigation, and core functionality verification.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button occasionally experiences DOM detachment during click

passed_tests: Role-based dashboard routing and access control
Admin dashboard with stats strip and live feeds
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Settings, Analytics, History)
Search and filter functionality on History page
Analytics page with charts and statistics
Logout functionality (with workaround for UI issue)
Responsive UI elements and data-testid attributes
